channel.title: Comments for page "What You Are in the Light"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "What You Are in the Light"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Before anyone says anthing…STOP. This is a near-3 month old story and the author is currently writing notes on what to create for the next chapter of the series, just wait for 1.5 months and the next page will be up. Be impatient and you will have to write (or draw) one of your best OC's trying to balance a unicycle while on top of 682 while also juggling jar's filled with Clef's sperm…without the lids!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
They weren't meant to be deliberately lame, just deliberately rather more conventional and lacking uniqueness as a contrast/thing for the third one to react to. The lameness was just an unfortunate side effect.

But yeah fair enough :p might revisit them at some point.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Deliberately writing two lame creepypastas doesn’t stop them from being lame, but the third one and its themes are strong enough to make me overlook the first two.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Part 3 is (finally) up! Next time we head to Celestria and see what's up with that.
